summary: Tested profile photos/avatars feature - All backend APIs return photo data correctly, frontend Avatar component properly displays photos when available or falls back to initials. 9/9 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Avatar component implementation is clean with proper photo/initials fallback logic
Backend APIs correctly include photo fields in responses
Color generation from name provides consistent avatar colors when no photo is uploaded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile photos/avatars feature fully implemented and working. Backend APIs return photo fields: /api/messages returns contact.photo, /api/lead-sources returns contact_photo, /api/admin/organizations/{id}/leaderboard returns photo_url, /api/leaderboard/regional returns photo_url. Frontend Avatar component displays photos when available or shows color-coded initials as fallback. Most test users/contacts don't have photos uploaded so initials are displayed.

features_verified.frontend_avatar_component: PASS - Avatar.tsx properly handles photo and initials fallback
features_verified.frontend_inbox_contact_photos: PASS - inbox.tsx shows contact photos when available
features_verified.frontend_admin_users_photos: PASS - admin/users.tsx shows user photos when available
features_verified.frontend_leaderboard_photos: PASS - admin/leaderboard.tsx shows user photos when available

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - Feature implementation testing, not bug fix
